A personal document. It describes how I want a machine to think with me, and in doing so, describes what I believe good thinking looks like.It is not a product, or methodology nor fix for current models, most of what is written here will become default behavior in time, and that will be a success, not an obsolescence.What I am writing down is not the gap between models and ideal behavior. That gap will close. What I am writing down is my own clarity about what kind of conversation I want to have with a thinking machine, kept as a record I can return to and recognize.

A decision router that does the legwork — all of it. Its job is to take the research → compare → find loop a person re-runs every time they buy something non-trivial and run that loop for them, so they never have to be the researcher.
